commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh But the people answered, You shall not go forth: for if we flee away, they will not care for us; neither if half of us die, will they care for us: but now you are worth ten thousand of us: therefore now it is better that you support us from out of the city. Ten thousand, "like us. "(Hebrew) (Calmet) Succour us, "by praying for us. "(Chaldean) or by sending reinforcements, where they may be necessary. (Menochius) David was persuaded "to reserve himself (like Otho) for the interest of the state, at a distance from the danger of battle. "(Tacitus, An.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
